mapper.sql: select id, company_id, report_month, risk_type, risk_level, risk_content, ai_suggestion, related_ids, status, handle_remark, create_time, update_time from biz_tax_risk
mapper.insert:
insert into biz_tax_risk
company_id, report_month, risk_type, risk_level, risk_content, ai_suggestion, related_ids, status, handle_remark, create_time,
#{companyId}, #{reportMonth}, #{riskType}, #{riskLevel}, #{riskContent}, #{aiSuggestion}, #{relatedIds}, #{status}, #{handleRemark}, #{createTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from biz_tax_risk where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select mr.company_id as companyId, mr.report_month as reportMonth, mr.total_income as totalIncome, mr.invoice_amount as invoiceAmount, mr.tax_paid as taxPaid, c.industry as industry, it.vat_min as vatMin from biz_month_report mr left join sys_company c on c.company_id = mr.company_id left join sys_industry_tax it on it.industry = c.industry where mr.company_id = #{companyId} and mr.report_month = #{reportMonth} limit 1

select count(1) from biz_voucher where company_id = #{companyId} and report_month = #{reportMonth} and ( remark like '%备用金%' or remark like '%股东借款%' or remark like '%老板借款%' or remark like '%私户%' or remark like '%个人卡%' or remark like '%现金货款%' )

select count(1) as totalCount, ifnull(sum(case when is_5000 = 1 then 1 else 0 end), 0) as is5000Count, count(distinct salary_amount) as distinctSalaryCount, ifnull(sum(salary_amount), 0) as salaryTotal from biz_salary where company_id = #{companyId} and report_month = #{reportMonth}
select company_id as companyId, max(report_month) as reportMonth from biz_month_report group by company_id
mapper.update: update biz_tax_risk set status = #{status}, handle_remark = #{handleRemark}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}

update biz_tax_risk set status = #{status}, handle_remark = #{handleRemark}, update_time = now() where id in
#{id}
